plan_type_rationale: Single-file targeted fix. No discovery needed. Zero blast radius outside semantic-integration.ts.

tasks.description: Read src/cli/semantic-integration.ts lines 40-80 to understand full interceptFileWrites() structure and all call sites of processProject()/processFile()
tasks.success_criteria: Full picture of where the patch is applied and where process methods complete

tasks.description: Add private _originalWriteFileSync and _originalWriteFile fields to DryRunSemanticOrchestrator; save originals before patching in interceptFileWrites(). Add restore() method that reassigns them back and sets a _restored guard flag.
tasks.success_criteria: restore() exists, is idempotent, restores both fs.writeFileSync and fs.promises.writeFile

tasks.description: Wrap processProject() and processFile() body in try/finally, calling this.restore() in the finally block
tasks.success_criteria: restore() is called even if processProject()/processFile() throws

tasks.description: Write a unit test: instantiate DryRunSemanticOrchestrator, call processProject() on a fixture dir, then verify fs.writeFileSync is the original function post-call
tasks.success_criteria: Test passes; fs.writeFileSync identity check passes after orchestrator exits

tasks.description: npx vitest --run to confirm all existing tests still pass
Commit fix and test with message: fix(semantic-integration): restore fs patch after dry-run completes (IMP-CORE-087)

acceptance_criteria: restore() is called in finally block of processProject() and processFile()
Unit test verifies fs.writeFileSync identity is restored after orchestrator exits
